title: Aftercut AIO LFWMK 80m2+25% EF Box UK
features: Use from May to August when weeds & moss are actively growing
description: Product Description Aftercut All-In-One is a triple action lawn treatment that greens and feeds your lawn, whilst controlling weeds and moss. The effective formulation kills more than 12 type of common weeds on the lawn. Its balanced nutrient levels deliver lush results and a stronger lawn from root to tip. Ingredients lawn feed Directions Apply from May to August when weeds and moss are actively growing. Use for lawn care to green and feed the lawn while controlling weeds and moss. Safety Warning Always wear gloves and other protective clothing when handling. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Do not apply in windy conditions. Keep out of reach of children and pets. In case of accidental contact, rinse immediately with plenty of water and seek medical advice. Do not use on lawns that will be used for growing food. Do not apply before heavy rain or during drought. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat sources and direct sunlight. Dispose of container responsibly. Manufacturer Contact Information Westland Horticulture Limited, 14 Granville Industrial Estate, Granville Road, Dungannon, Co Tyrone, BT70 1NJ. See more
